page_metadata.biotools__summary: Proteomics software to quantify peptides based on the total ion intensity of the MS/MS spectra. The software provides also relative quantification of isobaric peptides co-fragmented in MS/MS spectra which share the same sequence but have distinct localizations of post-translational modifications (PTMs).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Proteomics software to quantify peptides based on the total ion intensity of the MS/MS spectra.
